# hrobot_ssh_key (Data Source)

Look up a Hetzner Robot SSH key by its fingerprint.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hrobot_ssh_key" "example" {
  fingerprint = "56:29:99:a4:5d:ed:ac:d7:6d:ed:ac:d7:6d:ed:ac:d7"
}

output "ssh_key_name" {
  value = data.hrobot_ssh_key.example.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `fingerprint` (String) Key fingerprint (the identifier used by the Robot API).

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC 3339).
- `data` (String) The public key material.
- `name` (String) Key name.
- `size` (Number) Key size in bits.
- `type` (String) Key algorithm (e.g. ECDSA, RSA, ED25519).
